summary: Iteration 12 frontend testing completed successfully. All 9 requested features verified: (1) Trainer login redirects to /trainer page, (2) Trainer sidebar shows only 'My Dashboard' and 'Curriculum', (3) Academic Controller login redirects to /curriculum page, (4) Academic Controller sidebar shows only 'Quiz Exams' and 'Curriculum', (5) Branch Admin dashboard shows Financial Overview with 6 stats cards, (6) Branch Admin dashboard shows Trainer-wise Student Count section, (7) Branch Admin dashboard shows AI Insights section with health score, (8) Counsellor dashboard shows AI Insights section with health score, (9) Lead creation form shows 'Lead Date' and 'Discount Amount' fields.

issues: React hydration warning (span inside tbody) - cosmetic warning only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Layout.js: Trainer and Academic Controller role restrictions correctly implemented - Trainers see only 'My Dashboard' and 'Curriculum', Academic Controllers see only 'Quiz Exams' and 'Curriculum'
App.js HomeRedirect: Trainers correctly redirected to /trainer, Academic Controllers to /curriculum
Dashboard.js: Branch Admin Financial Stats component correctly shows 6 cards (Total Collection, Pending Amount, Monthly Revenue, Exam Revenue, Total Expenses, Net Revenue)
Dashboard.js: Trainer-wise Student Count section displays for Branch Admin
Dashboard.js: AI Insights section with health score displays for both Counsellor and Branch Admin roles
LeadsPage.js: Lead form correctly includes 'Lead Date' and 'Discount Amount (₹)' fields
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: All role-based features verified. Trainer redirects to /trainer and sees only 'My Dashboard' + 'Curriculum'. Academic Controller redirects to /curriculum and sees only 'Quiz Exams' + 'Curriculum'. Branch Admin sees Financial Overview with 6 stats, Trainer-wise Student Count, and AI Insights. Counsellor sees AI Insights section. Lead form has Lead Date and Discount Amount fields.
